title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is a customer retention and loyalty platform for Shopify e-commerce brands, founded in 2023 and headquartered in Pune, India.
* The software combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to boost customer lifetime value (LTV).
* Loyalty program features include points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* The review management feature automates text, photo, and video review collection via scheduled emails or SMS.
* The platform automatically syncs verified reviews with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* Businesses can create custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.

* Integration with Google Shopping and generation of SEO-rich snippets.
* Custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.
* Membership tiers offering exclusive perks like early access to products, free shipping, or special discounts.
* Built-in email marketing automation flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without custom development.
